variants.title: Donaldson P761446 Head Assembly, Hydraulic
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P761446 Head Assembly, Hydraulic serves as a durable and reliable component for hydraulic systems, providing a secure connection for fluid flow and system integration. Its robust construction supports high-pressure operations. Ideal for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications, this head assembly ensures efficient system performance and longevity.
specifications: Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.5 BAR
